name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BE089, Miu's new bucket bag, continuing the lazy and sexy trend from last season, another hot🔥 style. Paired with top-grade imported calfskin, fine and smooth leather surface, premium texture, casual and lightweight body, soft yet structured. Adjustable shoulder strap design, more refined and practical. Good temperament, casual and lazy, 100% head-turner for daily wear. Hand-stitched leather logo on the surface, brand new linen lining inside. Dimensions 23X 29X17Cm, comes with original packaging.
